steps.title: Find the upper bound
steps.content:
The third side must be less than the sum of the other two sides:
$$
x<9+14=23
$$

steps.title: Find the lower bound
steps.content:
The third side must be greater than the positive difference of the other two sides:
$$
x>|14-9|=5
$$

steps.title: Combine the bounds
steps.content: Together, the possible lengths satisfy $$ 5C.
